decks.notes: The main focus of this deck is to assemble a powerful combo involving Greasefang, Okiba Boss and Parhelion II to generate massive value and overwhelm the opponent. The deck includes a variety of tools to disrupt the opponent's game plan and protect the combo pieces, such as Thoughtseize, Fatal Push, and Vanishing Verse. By quickly assembling the combo and leveraging support from other cards like Monument to Endurance and Fleeting Spirit, the deck aims to dominate the battlefield and secure victory.

This combo deck revolves around utilizing Lotus Field to generate a large amount of mana quickly. The deck includes cards like Scapeshift and Lumra, Bellow of the Woods to take advantage of the mana generated by Lotus Field. The Wandering Minstrel helps to find key pieces of the combo while cards like Spell Pierce provide protection for the combo. The deck aims to ramp up quickly and overwhelm opponents with explosive plays using the synergy between Lotus Field and other cards in the deck.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize the Greasefang Parhelion combo to quickly overwhelm the opponent with powerful creatures and control spells. By using cards like Fleeting Spirit and Monument to Endurance to generate tokens and protect creatures, the deck aims to create a strong board presence while disrupting the opponent's strategy with Thoughtseize and Fatal Push. The inclusion of various lands and protection spells also allows for flexibility and adaptability in different matchups, making it a versatile and formidable deck choice in Pioneer 1 vs 1 format.

The main focus of this UR Aggro deck is to quickly and aggressively deal damage to the opponent through a combination of cheap spells and creatures. Cards like Monastery Swiftspear and Soul-Scar Mage provide early pressure while spells like Burst Lightning and Reckless Rage help to control the board and clear the way for attacks. Stormchaser's Talent enhances the deck's ability to pump out damage quickly, while cards like Academic Dispute and Boomerang Basics provide additional value and disruption. Overall, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with efficient threats and burn spells.

The main idea behind this deck is to utilize the powerful combo of Greasefang and Parhelion II to overwhelm the opponent with a strong board presence. The deck focuses on setting up a strong defense with cards like Guardian of New Benalia and Iron-Shield Elf while disrupting the opponent's gameplan with cards like Thoughtseize and Fatal Push. Monument to Endurance helps to support the combo pieces, while cards like Fleeting Spirit and Shadowy Backstreet provide additional utility and evasion. The deck aims to establish control of the battlefield and secure victory through a devastating combo finish.

This deck focuses on assembling the combo of Greasefang and Parhelion II to create a powerful board state. It utilizes cards like Concealed Courtyard and Cache Grab for mana ramp, while also including cards like Bitter Triumph and Thoughtseize for control. The deck also includes a variety of creatures like Formidable Speaker and Raffine's Informant to support the combo and protect against threats. With a mix of removal, ramp, and combo pieces, this deck aims to quickly overwhelm opponents with a strong and resilient strategy.

The deck focuses on utilizing Lotus Field to generate mana quickly and efficiently, allowing for explosive plays with cards such as Scapeshift and Formidable Speaker. With a mix of ramp, card draw, and protection, the deck aims to set up a game-winning combo with Thassa's Oracle or Glasspool Mimic. The inclusion of Aftermath Analyst and The Wandering Minstrel provides additional card advantage and versatility in handling various situations. Overall, the deck thrives on assembling its key pieces while creating a resilient board state to secure victory.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly establish a board presence and deal damage to the opponent as fast as possible. With a mix of low-cost creatures and burn spells, the deck aims to apply pressure early on and maintain it throughout the game. By efficiently utilizing cards like Monastery Swiftspear, Burst Lightning, and Reckless Rage, the deck can control the pace of the game and force the opponent to constantly respond to threats. Utilizing both creatures and spells, this UR Aggro deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with relentless aggression.

The deck revolves around assembling and protecting the combo of Greasefang and Parhelion II, using various black and green spells to control the game and disrupt the opponent's strategy. The cards in the deck help generate value and advantage while setting up the win condition of either overwhelming the opponent with powerful creatures or winning through combo synergy. The deck combines aggressive elements with control elements to create a versatile strategy that can adapt to different matchups and situations, ultimately aiming to outsmart and outmaneuver the opponent to secure victory.

The deck focuses on generating a powerful combo using Greasefang, Okiba Boss and Parhelion II. It includes a combination of protection spells, removal, and mana sources to set up and protect the combo. The deck also includes additional creatures and support cards to maintain board presence and control. By utilizing the synergy between Greasefang and Parhelion II, the deck aims to quickly overwhelm the opponent and secure victory.

This deck aims to assemble the powerful combo of Greasefang and Parhelion II to overwhelm opponents with a combination of aggressive creatures and token generation. It includes disruption spells like Thoughtseize and Bitter Triumph to protect the combo pieces and control the game. The deck also utilizes mana acceleration like Cache Grab and Formidable Speaker to ramp into its key cards quickly. Overall, the deck focuses on executing a game-winning combo while maintaining control over the battlefield through removal and disruptive spells.

This deck focuses on assembling the Greasefang Parhelion combo, utilizing cards like Fleeting Spirit and Iron-Shield Elf to protect the combo pieces. The deck includes disruptive spells like Thoughtseize and Fatal Push to control the game while ramping into the powerful Parhelion II. The deck also includes various land cards to fix mana and provide utility, along with removal spells like Vanishing Verse and Monument to Endurance to deal with opposing threats. Overall, the key concept of this deck is to efficiently assemble the combo and protect it until victory.

The deck focuses on generating value through the interaction of Greasefang, Okiba Boss and Parhelion II, using Monument to Endurance to protect them while setting up the combo. It also includes a mix of removal spells and disruption in the form of Thoughtseize and Vanishing Verse to control the board and protect the combo pieces. The deck aims to quickly assemble its key cards and overwhelm the opponent with a powerful board presence, emphasizing synergy and efficiency in executing its game plan.

This deck focuses on creating a powerful combo with Greasefang, Okiba Boss and Parhelion II to overwhelm the opponent. It utilizes cards like Bitter Triumph, Cache Grab, and Thoughtseize to control the board and disrupt the opponent's strategy. The deck also includes cards like Esika's Chariot and Formidable Speaker to generate additional value and maintain board presence. Overall, the key strategy of this deck is to assemble the combo pieces quickly and efficiently to outpace the opponent and secure victory.

The deck focuses on utilizing Greasefang and Parhelion II to create a powerful combo that can quickly overwhelm opponents. It also includes cards like Formidable Speaker, Witherbloom Command, and Cache Grab to support the combo and control the game. Boseiju, Who Endures, and Darkbore Pathway provide additional utility and mana fixing, while Thoughtseize helps disrupt the opponent's game plan. Overall, the deck aims to efficiently assemble its combo pieces, generate value, and outpace the opponent to achieve victory.

The main concept of this deck is to use Lotus Field to generate a large amount of mana quickly, allowing you to cast powerful spells like Scapeshift and Lumra, Bellow of the Woods. The deck also includes cards like Spelunking and Arboreal Grazer to help ramp up your mana production even further. The goal is to overwhelm your opponent with a combination of efficient ramp and powerful combo plays, ultimately leading to victory through massive mana advantage and powerful board presence.
